login.title: Sign In
login.description: Enter your credentials to access your account
login.captchaError: Please complete the CAPTCHA to continue.

register.title: Create Account
register.description: Sign up to start using ProfeVision
register.firstNameTooShort: First name must be at least 2 characters long
register.lastNameTooShort: Last name must be at least 2 characters long
register.successDescription: A confirmation email has been sent to your email address.

resetPassword.title: Reset password
resetPassword.description: Enter your email address to receive instructions to reset your password
resetPassword.successDescription: A link to reset your password has been sent to your email address.
resetPassword.checkEmailDescription: We've sent a link to reset your password to your email address. Please check your inbox.
resetPassword.spamNote: If you haven't received the email in a few minutes, check your spam folder or try again.

updatePassword.title: Update password
updatePassword.successDescription: Your password has been updated successfully.
updatePassword.invalidLink: The reset link is invalid or has expired. Please request a new link.
updatePassword.passwordTooShort: Password must be at least 8 characters long

verifyEmail.title: Verify your email
verifyEmail.description: We've sent a confirmation link to your email address. Please check your inbox and follow the instructions to complete registration.
verifyEmail.spamNote: If you haven't received the email in a few minutes, check your spam folder or request a new verification link.

emailConfirmed.title: Email Verified!
emailConfirmed.description: Your email address has been successfully verified.
emailConfirmed.successMessage: You can now sign in to your account and start using all ProfeVision features.

errors.passwordTooShort: Password must be at least 6 characters long
errors.captchaRequired: Please complete the CAPTCHA to continue
errors.captchaError: Error validating CAPTCHA. Please try again.
errors.sessionExpired: Your session has expired. Please sign in again.
errors.generalError: An error occurred. Please try again.
